actions.name: Interstellar Shift
actions.description:
Effect: The user freely Moves up to 6m of a Movement Type of its choice and change Forme, healing @Tick[2] of HP. Depending on its Forme, it gains another Ability.

  • Normal Forme: @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-abilities.Item.RmLYmSTJEvyBNTh5]{Pressure}
  • Attack Forme: @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-abilities.Item.i2YkuytUf6z6fm34]{Mold Breaker}
  • Speed Forme: @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-abilities.Item.LpovBWFJb0J2ggv1]{Speed Boost}
  • Defense Forme: @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-abilities.Item.uOMBIIsKTRROmTBW]{Sturdy}

actions.name: Interstellar Virulence
actions.description:
Effect: The user freely Moves up to 6m of a Movement Type of its choice and change Forme. Depending on its Forme, it gains another Ability.

  • Normal Forme: @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-abilities.Item.RmLYmSTJEvyBNTh5]{Pressure}
  • Attack Forme: @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-abilities.Item.i2YkuytUf6z6fm34]{Mold Breaker}
  • Speed Forme: @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-abilities.Item.LpovBWFJb0J2ggv1]{Speed Boost}
  • Defense Forme: @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-abilities.Item.uOMBIIsKTRROmTBW]{Sturdy}

While the user is @Affliction[fainted], they may spend 8 PP. They lose @Affliction[fainted], not accruing @Affliction[weary], heal @Tick[6] of HP, and gain @Affliction[resolved] 7 and @Affliction[braced].

system.description:
Effect: The user freely Moves up to 6m of a Movement Type of its choice and change Forme, healing @Tick[2] of HP. Depending on its Forme, it gains another Ability.

  • Normal Forme: @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-abilities.Item.RmLYmSTJEvyBNTh5]{Pressure}
  • Attack Forme: @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-abilities.Item.i2YkuytUf6z6fm34]{Mold Breaker}
  • Speed Forme: @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-abilities.Item.LpovBWFJb0J2ggv1]{Speed Boost}
  • Defense Forme: @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-abilities.Item.uOMBIIsKTRROmTBW]{Sturdy}

While the user is @Affliction[fainted], they may spend 8 PP during their Activation. They lose @Affliction[fainted], not accruing @Affliction[weary], heal @Tick[6] of HP, and gain @Affliction[resolved] 7 and @Affliction[braced].
